---
title: "Palmer Penguins"
format: dashboard
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(gapminder)
library(gt)
```

## Row
```{r}
gapminder |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = gdpPercap, y =lifeExp)) +
  geom_point()
```

## Row {.tabset}

```{r}
#| title: Chart 2


gapminder |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = gdpPercap, y =lifeExp)) +
  geom_point()
```

```{r}
#| title: Chart 3


gapminder |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = gdpPercap, y =lifeExp)) +
  geom_smooth()
```


```{r}
#| title: table


gapminder |>
  group_by(continent, year) |>
  summarize(mean_lifeExp = 
              round(mean(lifeExp), 1)) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = continent, 
              values_from = mean_lifeExp) |>
  gt()
```
